# Formal Asset Batch Plan

## Purpose

Track candidate assets, approval status, QC, and future runtime intake.

Generated art is not a game asset by default. Only rows explicitly marked `Approved for Game Asset` may move toward controlled runtime intake.

## Current Style Basis

| Source | Role | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Reference images | Style inspiration | Reference only | Do not copy distinctive content. |
| First approval samples | Style anchors | Draft | Promote only to `Approved for Expansion` after user review. |

## Candidate Batches

| Batch ID | Category | Source path | Status | Intended runtime use | QC summary | Next gate |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PACK-001 | Player / enemy / map | TBD | Draft | TBD | Pending | Generate candidates |
